name: Sweet Potato Puff
recipeIngredient: 3 cups cold mashed sweet potatoes (without added milk or butter)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the potatoes, sugar, butter, eggs, milk, and vanilla extract until fluffy.
2. Stir in the coconut.
3. Spoon the mixture into a greased 2-1/2 quart baking dish.
4. Combine the topping ingredients until well blended.
5. Sprinkle the topping evenly over the sweet potatoes.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes or until golden brown.
